title: domain.ID parser/generator (per-parent monotonic numbering)
acceptance_criteria: ParseID handles all forms from §4: PROJECT, PROJECT-E01, PROJECT-E01-S03, PROJECT-E01-S03-T02.
ChildID(parent, n) returns the next free child ID under parent given an iterable of existing siblings.
ParentOf returns the parent ID or empty string for projects.
ProjectCode is 3–6 uppercase letters; rejects invalid forms with ErrUsage.
Includes a property test asserting parse(generate(x))==x for any valid x and parentOf(childId(p,n))==p.
